name.openaiimageBot.description: Name of the OpenAI Image bot

description.size.message: Output image size. Supported values vary by model: gpt-image-1 / gpt-image-1.5 only accept 1024x1024, 1536x1024, 1024x1536. gpt-image-2 additionally supports 1792x1024, 1024x1792 and 2K/4K presets, and allows custom dimensions.

sizeGroup.standard1k.description: Heading for the 1K size group billed at the base rate

sizeGroup.preset2k.description: Heading for the 2K size group billed at 1.5×

sizeGroup.preset4k.description: Heading for the 4K size group billed at 1.5×

description.customSize.message: Enable to set width and height freely (gpt-image-2 only). Each side must be a multiple of 16, the longer side ≤ 3840, and total pixels ≤ 8,294,400. Non-1K standard sizes are billed at 1.5× the base rate.

error.customSizePositive.message: Width and height must be positive integers

error.customSizeMultiple.message: Width and height must be multiples of {multiple}

error.customSizeMin.message: Width and height must be at least {min}

description.prompt.message: Prompt for generating or editing images

description.model.message: Model used for image generation and editing.

description.imageUrls.message: Upload 1-5 reference images to enter edit mode.

placeholder.prompt.message: Enter prompt, e.g., watercolor kitten on the table

message.promptRequired.description: Error message when the prompt is missing

message.startTaskFailed.message: Failed to initiate task, please contact the administrator:

message.usedUp.message: Your credits are exhausted, please purchase more credits to continue

message.uploadImageExceed.message: You can upload a maximum of 5 images

message.uploadImageError.message: Failed to upload image, please try again later
